name: omarchy_terminal
content:
Termina 
Ghostty is the defaut termina for Omarchy. It's fast, beautifu and supports both tabs and
spits. The defaut keybindings you' want to earn are:
Hotkey Function
Super + Return New termina
Ctrl + Shift + E New spit beow
Ctrl + Shift + O New spit besides
Ctrl + Alt + Arrows Move between spits
Super + Ctrl + Shift + Arrows Resize spit by 10 ines
Super + Ctrl + Shift + Alt + Arrows Resize spit by 100 ines
Ctrl + Shift + T New tab
Ctrl + Shift + Arrows Move between tabs tab
Alt + Numbers Go to specific tab
Shift + Pg Up/Down Scro the history
Ctrl + Left mouse Open ink in browser
But if Ghostty isn't to your preference, we aso support fu theme matching and
instaation for Aacritty and Kitty through Insta > Termina in the Omarchy Menu. This wi
insta the package, if missing, and set the termina as the defaut for Super + Return  (and
use it for a the Omarchy TUIs).
Note: Some oder supports have troube running Ghostty due to their GPUs. If you get any
errors ike that, you can switch to Aacritty, which is more broady compatibe with oder
systems.
Terminal · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/106/terminal
1 of 2 2/2/26, 1:24 AM
